name: Grandpa Would Have Loved These Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Quaker Oats (quick or Old fashioned, uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine Butter Flavor Crisco, brown sugar, and granulated sugar. Beat with an electric mixer on low speed until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Then add milk and vanilla, mixing well.
4. Stir in the pudding mix until just combined. Mix in flour, 1/2 cup of Quick Quaker oats, coconut, baking soda, and salt until fully incorporated.
5. Gently fold in 1 cup of Quaker Oats, Hershey's semi-sweet chips, mini semi-sweet chocolate, and pecans with a spoon.
6. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake for 7 to 9 minutes or until golden brown around the edges and slightly moist in the center. Allow cooling for 3 to 5 minutes before transferring to paper towels. If desired, use regular semi-sweet chips instead of mini chips.
